game_name: Advanced Dungeons & Dragons: Heroes of the Lance

element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Five heroes function as basic melee combatants with standard attacks
Eight heroes total; next hero appears when current dies. Resource management via hero selection
Special ability character; critical for resource preservation across hero roster
Special ability character; offensive magic distinct from melee
Special ability character; required for progression through trapped areas
Final boss; narrative climax in ruined city of Xak Tsaroth
Primary quest objective; macguffin driving narrative forward

typical_relief_triggers: Hero death allowing fresh character with full health
Access to healing magic from Goldmoon
typical_tension_triggers: Hero taking damage and approaching death state
Trap-filled rooms requiring specific character (trap removal)
Resource pressure as hero count depletes
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Arcade-paced action with escalating difficulty; frustratingly difficult spike. Hero rotation mechanic creates wave-like tension as players burn through roster.

difficulty_curve.early_game: Manageable; introduces hero rotation and basic combat
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Escalating; special abilities required for progression, trap sections demand specific characters
difficulty_curve.late_game: Sharply difficult; known for frustrating difficulty spike
notable_spikes: Overall game difficulty described as frustratingly high
Inability to save game compounds difficulty perception
Players can lose many heroes in short periods if unprepared

notable_level_patterns.description: Game follows side-scrolling action game structure through ruined city of Xak Tsaroth. Single hero visible at a time; horizontal movement primary axis.
Areas require Tasslehoff (Kender pickpocket) for trap removal; forces strategic hero selection and sequencing
Extended combat sequences designed to systematically deplete player's hero roster, requiring careful resource management and hero rotation strategy
Khisanth ancient dragon final encounter in ruined city; climactic battle matching narrative from Dragons of Autumn Twilight novel

sources_used: Wikipedia: Advanced Dungeons & Dragons: Heroes of the Lance
